zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Lusignan VII於1065年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安盧希南時，他的父親Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI26歲，母親Hildegarde De Thouars8歲。他於1090年之前與Saracena de Lezay在法國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1147年登記服兵役。他去世於1151年2月2日在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南享年86歲，埋葬在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特安古利e。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Lusignan VII于1065年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安盧希南时，他的父亲Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI26岁，母亲Hildegarde De Thouars8岁。他于1090年之前与Saracena de Lezay在法国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1147年登记服兵役。他去世于1151年2月2日在法国波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南享年86岁，埋葬在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特安古利e。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Lusignan VII was born in 1065, in Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI, was 26 and his mother, Hildegarde De Thouars, was 8. He married Saracena de Lezay before 1090, in France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1147. He died on 2 February 1151, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 86, and was buried in Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Lusignan VII est né en 1065, à Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Hildegarde De Thouars, avait 8 ans. Il a épousé Saracena de Lezay avant 1090, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1147. Il est décédé le 2 février 1151, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Lusignan VII 1065 in Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI 26 und seine Mutter Hildegarde De Thouars 8. Er hat vor 1090 in Frankreich Saracena de Lezay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1147 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 2. Februar 1151 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Lusignan VII è nato il nel 1065 nel Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Hildegarde De Thouars, aveva 8 anni. Lui sposato Saracena de Lezay prima del 1090, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1147. Morì il 2 febbraio 1151, nel Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Lusignan VIIが1065年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンルシグナンで生まれた時，父Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VIは26歳，母Hildegarde De Thouarsは8歳であった。1090年以前にフランスでSaracena de Lezayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1147年に兵役登録をした。彼は1151年2月2日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンで86歳で死去し，フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエントアンゴウルeメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Lusignan VII(이)가 1065년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 루시그난에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Hildegarde De Thouars(은)는 8세였다. 그는 1090년 이전 프랑스에서 Saracena de Lezay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1147년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1151년 2월 2일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 앤굴e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Lusignan VII nasceu em 1065, em Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Hildegarde De Thouars, tinha 8 anos. Ele casou-se com Saracena de Lezay antes 1090, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1147. Ele faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1151, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Lusignan VII родился в 1065 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Hildegarde De Thouars, 8. Он женился на женщине по имени Saracena de Lezay перед 1090 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1147 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 2 февраля 1151 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности ангоулeм, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Lusignan VII nació en 1065, en Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Hildegarde De Thouars, tenía 8 años. Se casó con Saracena de Lezay antes de 1090, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1147. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1151, en Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
